title: Guardrails Configuration Schema
description: Schema for validating guardrails configuration in L5 features.

mode.description: Guardrail mode. Must match architecture_preflight.md section 12.

nemo_config_path.description: Path to NeMo Guardrails config directory (required when mode is 'nemo' or 'both').

guardrails_ai_validators.description: List of Guardrails AI validators in use (required when mode is 'guardrails-ai' or 'both').

bypass_allowed.description: Whether guardrails can be bypassed for internal/non-user-facing calls. Requires ADR if true.
